title: decimals / exec doesn't truncate decimals
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
CREATE TABLE test2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, value REAL, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test1(id));
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.value FROM test1 t1 JOIN test2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.value > 0.1;
key_bug_features: exec does not truncate decimal values correctly
